source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And he is my little brother George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: She is Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: He is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I am Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zong1 baan6
cards.english: [Dressing Up]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa同George 喺豬先生同豬太太嘅睡房玩緊
cards.jyutping: tung4 hai2 zyu1 sin1 saang1 tung4 zyu1 taai3 taai2 ge3 seoi6 fong2 waan2 gan2
cards.english: Peppa and George are playing in Mr. and Mrs. Pig's bedroom.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai6 me1 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: What's this?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa揾到個裝滿舊衫嘅箱喎
cards.jyutping: wan2 dou3 go3 zong1 mun5 gau6 saam1 ge3 soeng1 wo3
cards.english: Peppa has found a box full of old clothes.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 呢頂帽係爹哋㗎，而呢條裙就係媽咪嘅
cards.jyutping: ne1 ding2 mou2 hai6 de1 dei6 gaa4 ji4 ne1 tiu4 kwan4 zau6 hai6 maa1 mi4 ge3
cards.english: This hat belongs to Daddy, and this dress belongs to Mummy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George，不如我哋着起佢哋 然後扮媽咪爹哋吖
cards.jyutping: bat1 jyu4 ngo5 dei6 zoek6 hei2 keoi5 dei6 jin4 hau6 baan6 maa1 mi4 de1 dei6 aa1
cards.english: George, why don't we put them on and pretend to be Mummy and Daddy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 呢頂係爹哋嘅帽，仲有爹哋件衫
cards.jyutping: ne1 ding2 hai6 de1 dei6 ge3 mou6 zung6 jau5 de1 dei6 gin6 saam1
cards.english: This hat is Daddy's, and here's Daddy's shirt.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 nei5 hou2 maa1
cards.english: Mr. Pig, how are you?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 leon4 dou3 ngo5 laak3
cards.english: Now it's my turn.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ni1 tiu4 hai6 maa1 mi4 ge3 kwan4
cards.english: This skirt is Mummy's.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zung6 jau5 maa1 mi4 ding2 mou2
cards.english: And Mummy's hat too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 nei5 deoi3 haai4 hai2 bin1 aa3
cards.english: Mr. Pig, where are your shoes?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 jiu3 zoek6 maa1 mi4 deoi3 haai4 aa3
cards.english: I want to wear Mummy's shoes too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 而家我就要化妝扮靚，就好似媽咪噉
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 ngo5 zau6 jiu3 faa3 zong1 baan6 leng3 zau6 hou2 ci5 maa1 mi4 gam2
cards.english: Now I'm going to put on makeup and dress up, just like Mummy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: wan2 dou3 zyu1 taai3 taai2 ge3 faa3 zong1 soeng1
cards.english: Peppa has found Mrs. Pig's makeup box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 hai6 fan2 dai2
cards.english: First is foundation.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 好靚啊，而家要搽啲唇膏
cards.jyutping: hou2 leng3 aa3 ji4 gaa1 jiu3 caa4 di1 seon4 gou1
cards.english: So pretty, now I need to put on some lipstick.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 呢位豬太太真係好靚啊
cards.jyutping: nei4 wai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2 zan1 hai6 hou2 leng3 aa3
cards.english: This Mrs. Pig is really pretty.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 跟我嚟吖，豬先生，係時候去做嘢喇
cards.jyutping: gan1 ngo5 lai4 aa1 zyu1 sin1 saang1 hai6 si4 hau6 heoi3 zou6 je5 laa3
cards.english: Come with me, Mr. Pig, it's time to go to work.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 豬太太用緊佢部電腦做嘢
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 jung6 gan2 keoi5 bou6 din6 nou5 zou6 je5
cards.english: Mrs. Pig is using her computer for work.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: dim2 aa3 dim2 aa3
cards.english: Hello, Peppa? Hello, George?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 tau4 sin1 waa6 me1 waa6
cards.english: What did you say just now?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 tung4 nei5 daa2 ziu1 fu1 aa3
cards.english: Peppa, I am greeting you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我都唔係Peppa，我係豬太太啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 m4 hai6 ngo5 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2 aa3
cards.english: I'm not Peppa, I'm Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: juk1 hai6 aa1 ngo5 ming4 aa3
cards.english: Oh, is that so? I understand now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 nei5 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Mrs. Pig, hello.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Hello.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: And this is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 nei5 gei2 hou2 aa1 maa1
cards.english: Mr. Pig, how are you?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 唔好意思啊，我而家有好多嘢要做啊
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 ji3 si3 aa3 ngo5 ji4 gaa1 jau5 hou2 do1 je5 jiu3 zou6 aa3
cards.english: I'm sorry, I have a lot to do right now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: wai3 wai3 hai6 aa3
cards.english: Hello, yes.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zou6 nei4 joeng6 zou6 go2 joeng6 lo1
cards.english: Doing this, doing that.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 sai2 laa3 m4 goi1 zoi3 gin3
cards.english: No need, thank you, goodbye.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 hoeng2 sau6 baan6 zyu1 taai3 taai2 gam2 wo3
cards.english: Peppa really enjoys pretending to be Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: faan2 ji4 zau6 gok3 dak1 hou2 mun6 aa3
cards.english: But George finds it boring.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 等一陣啊，豬先生，我差唔多得㗎喇
cards.jyutping: dang2 jat1 zan6 aa3 zyu1 sin1 saang1 ngo5 caa1 m4 do1 dak1 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Wait a moment, Mr. Pig, I'm almost done.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa3 gaau2 dim6
cards.english: Okay, done.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 嚟啦，豬先生，你都係時候要做嘢喇
cards.jyutping: lai4 laa1 zyu1 sin1 saang1 nei5 dou1 hai6 si4 hau6 jiu3 zou6 je5 laa3
cards.english: Come on, Mr. Pig, it's time for you to do some work.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 再見喇，豬太太同豬先生
cards.jyutping: zoi3 gin3 laa3 zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: Goodbye, Mrs. Pig and Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zoi3 gin3
cards.english: Goodbye.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 hai2 faa1 jyun4 gwat6 gan2 lung1
cards.english: Mr. Pig is digging a hole in the garden.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 aa3 nei5 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Hello, Peppa, hello, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 m4 hai6 aa3
cards.english: I'm not Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我係豬太太，而佢就係豬先生嘞
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2 ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1 laak3
cards.english: I'm Mrs. Pig, and this is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 豬先生係嚟呢度做嘢㗎
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 hai6 lai4 ni1 dou6 zou6 je5 gaa4
cards.english: Mr. Pig is here to work.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你真係好好人啊，豬先生
cards.jyutping: nei5 zan1 hai6 hou2 hou2 jan4 aa3 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: You're so kind, Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 不過你要小心啊，呢個窿好深㗎
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 nei5 jiu3 siu2 sam1 aa3 ni1 go3 lung1 hou2 sam1 gaa4
cards.english: But you have to be careful, this hole is very deep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我希望豬先生 你唔係着住你嗰件飲衫嚟掘窿啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hei1 mong6 zyu1 sin1 saang1 nei5 m4 hai6 zoek6 zyu6 nei5 go2 gin6 jam2 saam1 lai4 gwat6 lung1 laa1
cards.english: I hope, Mr. Pig, you're not wearing your nice clothes to dig the hole.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 hou2 soeng2 daai6 sing1 gam2 giu3 wo3
cards.english: I really want to shout loudly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jau5 syut3 gou1 sik6 aa3 gam3 do1 wai6
cards.english: There's ice cream to eat, everyone.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jau5 syut3 gou1 sik6
cards.english: Ice cream to eat?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你哋要除低啲污糟衫先至可以食雪糕㗎
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 jiu3 ceoi4 dai1 di1 wu1 zou1 saam1 sin1 zi3 ho2 ji5 sik6 syut3 gou1 gaa4
cards.english: You need to take off your dirty clothes before you can eat ice cream.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我係豬太太，佢係豬先生啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2 keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1 aa3
cards.english: I'm Mrs. Pig, and he is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 hang2 ding6
cards.english: Are you sure?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3
cards.english: Yes.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai6 gam2 tung4 hai2 bin1 dou6 aa3
cards.english: In that case, where are Peppa and George?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 m4 zi1 wo3
cards.english: We don't know.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: taai3 ho2 sik1 laa3
cards.english: That's too bad.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我仲攞咗佢哋鐘意食嘅雪糕嚟𠻹
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zung6 lo2 zo2 keoi5 dei6 zung1 ji3 sik6 ge3 syut3 gou1 lai4 tim1
cards.english: I even brought their favorite ice cream!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 佢哋唔喺度，噉啲雪糕就…
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dei6 m4 hai2 dou6 gam2 di1 syut3 gou1 zau6
cards.english: They're not here, so the ice cream will...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 hai2 dou6 wo3
cards.english: We're here!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 ceot1 jin6 aa1
cards.english: Peppa, George, you've appeared?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 係啊，媽咪，我哋頭先 喺度扮緊你同爹哋啊
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 maa1 mi4 ngo5 dei6 tau4 sin1 hai2 dou6 baan6 gan2 nei5 tung4 de1 dei6 aa3
cards.english: Yes, Mommy, we were just pretending to be you and Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E18 Dressing Up［裝扮］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 zaang1 di1 m4 jing6 dak1 aa3
cards.english: We almost didn't recognize you.

defs: 1. obey; (adverb) 1. since…then; 2. because of (something), then…; 3. soon; (adverb) exactly;
allow something be a certain way
(after a suppositional clause) in that case; then
(after a clause of action) as soon as; immediately after
(same as 就是[jiu4 shi4]) merely; nothing else but; simply; just; precisely; exactly
as much as; as many as
(often followed by 著|着[zhe5]) taking advantage of
(bound form) to reach; to attain (as in 一蹴而就[yi1 cu4 er2 jiu4])
(pattern: 就[jiu4] ... 也[ye3] ...) even if ... still ...
(pattern: 不[bu4] ... 就[jiu4] ...) if not ... then must be ...
suffix of a noun of locality
used in courteous phrases expressing causing trouble
(bound form) having; with; -ful; -ed; -al (as in 有意[you3 yi4] intentional)
(slang) "here"; an expression to indicate that someone is here
please; thanks (for services rendered rather than gifts); excuse me
1. ex-; (adjective) general term of something that is solid "一舊"
jacket with open slits in place of sleeves
generic term for a sacrifice to the gods
Ming (c. 2000 BC), fourth of the legendary Flame Emperors, 炎帝[Yan2 di4] descended from Shennong 神農|神农[Shen2 nong2] Farmer God
generic term for a sacrifice to the gods
person who tries not to offend anyone, even at the expense of principle
before; (adverb) a moment before; a moment ago; just now
to be certain; to be positive
sentence-final particle, contraction of 了啊, indicating exclamation
particle placed after each item in a list of examples
sentence-final particle, contraction of 了啊, indicating exclamation
particle placed after each item in a list of examples
used as a final particle to add emphasis
used as a final particle to add emphasis
used as a final particle to add emphasis
first of all; in the first place
still (usually used in the context of ‘still not’ or to describe the remaining time left till something)
to do; to engage in; to hold (a party etc)
(of a person) to be (an intermediary, a good student etc); to become (husband and wife, friends etc)
(of a thing) to serve as; to be used for
not equal to; not as good as; inferior to
(exclamatory phrase) 'done!'; (v.) to finish something; to settle something; to kill someone.
(noun of sibling) younger brother; slang for penis
that type; that kind; that way [colloquial]
by (indicates agent in the passive mood)
by (indicates agent in the passive mood)
to beautify; to apply makeup; to dress up; to adorn; to deck out
placed afte a verb to indicate an ongoing
to greet sb by word or action
(phrase) no need to; do not need something; it's unnecessary
an alternative form for 能,to be able
anyway (to get back to a previous topic)
a derogatory way to address someone who is Japanese
sentence-final particle, contraction of "嘅呀" (Cantonese), to express doubt
sentence-final particle, contraction of "嘅呀" (Cantonese), to express doubt
to choose to rub, to wipe
to choose to rub, to wipe
top-hat; the hat; that hat; this hat
jacket with open slits in place of sleeves
jacket with open slits in place of sleeves
to be called; to be known as
to decorate; to adorn; to dress up
to get (from a depot or counter)
classifier for occurrences or unpredictable events: case, instance
final particle which transforms statements into questions that indicate doubt or surprise (Cantonese)
final particle which transforms statements into questions that indicate doubt or surprise (Cantonese)
ice cream bar; ice cream popsicle
(adv.) only then; not until; only after; then
particle indicating that a previously asked question is to be applied to the preceding word ("What about ...?", "And ...?")
particle for inquiring about location ("Where is ...?")
particle signaling a pause, to emphasize the preceding words and allow the listener time to take them on board ("ok?", "are you with me?")
(at the end of a declarative sentence) particle indicating continuation of a state or action
(sentence-final particle) used in questions to link back to prior discourse or context ("what about...?", "and...?")
(sentence-final particle) indicating that a state or situation still holds
(discourse particle) used to mark a slight pause or emphasis in speech
dense wool fabric (used for coats and jackets)
(suffix indicating firmness, steadiness, or coming to a halt)
used after a verb to indicate a continuous state or an action which has not been completed yet
used between two verbs to indicate the two actions being performed simultaneously
used after a verb to indicate the action is temporary, similar to adding 'for now' or 'yet' after a verb
sentence-final particle similar to 了le [了], but carrying a tone of approval
sentence-final particle similar to 了le [了], but carrying a tone of approval
sentence-final particle similar to 了[le5], but carrying a tone of approval
